sections.biography-source-undefined: Zhuge Jing, styled Xingzong, was from Yangdu county, Langya commandery. He was the second son of Zhuge Zhan. He served Jin as Prefect of Mei, then inspector of Jiang Province.

full_text:
Zhuge Jing (Xingzong) 諸葛京 (行宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Jing (諸葛京), styledXingzong (行宗). Zhuge Zhan’s second son. Served Jin following the collapse of Shu. Zhuge Jing was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.

BiographySource Undefined
Zhuge Jing, styled Xingzong, was from Yangdu county, Langya commandery. He was the second son of Zhuge Zhan. He served Jin as Prefect of Mei, then inspector of Jiang Province.
